description_long: This is a large, rectangular, mid-century modern sofa upholstered in a warm tan or camel-colored material. The entire exterior, including the seat, backrest, and armrests, features a deep, diamond-tufted pattern, giving it a plush and luxurious appearance. The sofa has broad, straight armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy and symmetrical silhouette. It is supported by four short, outwardly angled wooden legs, which are visible beneath the base and add a touch of contrast to the upholstery. The seat is a single, continuous cushion integrated into the frame, and the back and sides are thickly padded for comfort. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale outdoor lounges.
description: A large, tan, diamond-tufted sofa with straight, high armrests and short wooden legs, exuding a plush and modern look. The upholstery is continuous and deeply padded, with a single integrated seat cushion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep diamond-tufted seat, and symmetrical armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, tufted backrest and the sofa's boxy profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and depth, with visible tufting detail.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion and backrest, both fully attached and uniformly tufted, with no loose or segmented cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, thickly padded and fully upholstered with diamond tufting.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, outwardly angled wooden legs positioned at the corners, exposed and slightly tapered, with a dark brown finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest integrated with the armrests, fully padded and diamond-tufted.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Deep diamond-tufted pattern covering all visible surfaces, creating a quilted, textured appearance.
